item.title: Version 1.9.0
item.description:
### Added - Named separators: separators in favorites tabs can now have a text label, displayed as a full-width pill-styled badge (themeable width) - Theme effects: search field inner shadow setting - Theme fills: texture overlay support — any fill can now have a tiled image texture with configurable opacity and blend mode
### Fixed - Mouse click areas for favorite/delete buttons were misaligned - Drag-and-drop reorder indicator was off by one when dragging items downward
